title: [🎄] Seasonal Decorations
description: Decorate your world for Halloween with spooky candles, carved pumpkins, coffins, and eerie details to bring true haunted atmosphere to Minecraft.
body:
# 🎄 Seasonal Decorations
Bring cozy holiday vibes to your Minecraft world! 🕯️🎄 Decorate your home, village, or entire world for winter with glowing lights, festive candles, and magical snow-covered details.

![Update 2 Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/lcQpdCeI/images/ff6bc1e060d0dacffb2efef8896d97cbebfc9482.png)

## ❄️ About
**Seasonal Decorations** returns with a new chapter — **Winter & Christmas Edition!**
Add warmth and wonder to your builds with beautiful seasonal blocks designed for snowy towns, cozy cabins, and festive markets. Everything in the mod is fully decorative, lightweight, and server-friendly — perfect for builders and holiday lovers alike.

## 🎁 Features in v2.0: Winter Edition
- 🕯️ Frost & Amethyst Candles — shimmer with icy and magical glow.
- 🎄 Decorated Trees — glowing ornaments and twinkling garlands.
- 🧦 Christmas Stockings — hang them near the fireplace and wait for gifts!
- 🧊 Ice Lanterns — gentle blue light to illuminate your snowy nights.
- ☃️ Snowman & Gift Boxes — build cheerful scenes around your base.

(All blocks are purely decorative and optimized for building.)

## ✨ Upcoming updates
- 🪄 Magical snow globes and enchanted bells 🔔
- 🏠 Cozy furniture and winter hearths 🔥
- 🎇 Fireworks and festive garlands 💫
- 🎅 Santa’s mailbox and toy decorations 🎁

New updates will be released weekly throughout December to fill your world with holiday spirit!

## 🧡 Why you’ll love it
- ✅ Lightweight and lag-free
- ✅ Great for builders and mapmakers
- ✅ Multiplayer-friendly
- ✅ Works perfectly with other decoration mods

## 🛠️ Technical info
- Supported versions: 1.20.1 Forge, 1.21.1 NeoForge (more soon)
- No dependencies required
- Language support: English (more soon)

## 📷 Screenshots

## 📣 Support & Feedback
Found a bug or have a spooky idea?
Leave a comment or message on the mod page — your feedback helps shape the next update!
